title: viola × gotlandica
intro: Viola × gotlandica, also known as Gotland violet, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Viola reichenbachiana and Viola epemium. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its anthocyanins, which are powerful antioxidants that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × gotlandica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Viola × gotlandica can be used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and may be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
